top_signals.title: Dominguez Warns: No Safe Hormuz Passage
top_signals.summary: Secretary-General of the IMO, Arsenio Dominguez, has issued a warning to the shipping industry:"I am increasingly concerned by reports that vessels continue to attempt to transit the Strait of Hormuz without any credible security guarantees…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan’s opposition leader tells US and China not to use her country as ‘pawn’ - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Taiwan’s opposition leader tells US and China not to use her country as ‘pawn’  Financial Times

top_signals.title: JR East to shift from magnetic to QR code tickets in 2027
top_signals.summary: JR East said removing the nonrecyclable magnetic layer on the back of the conventional tickets will help reduce environmental impact.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
